mapper.select: SELECT * FROM model_training_job WHERE job_id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM model_training_job WHERE model_type = #{modelType} AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND deployed = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT accuracy_estimate FROM model_training_job WHERE model_type = #{modelType} AND status = 'SUCCESS' AND deployed = 1 AND accuracy_estimate IS NOT NULL AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE model_training_job SET deployed = #{deployed}, deploy_time = #{deployed} = 1 ? NOW() : NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE model_version = #{modelVersion} AND deleted = 0
